title: oreobolus pumilio var. strictus
intro: Oreobolus pumilio var. strictus, also known as the Dwarf Sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oreobolus pumilio var. strictus include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, where it is steeped in hot water to release its active compounds and provide relief from respiratory issues.
